nasb.text: Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon came up against him and bound him with bronze chains to take him to Babylon.

esv.text: Against him came up Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon and bound him in chains to take him to Babylon.

cnv.text: 巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒上來攻打他，用銅鍊鎖住他，把他帶到巴比倫去。

ccb.text: 巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒起兵攻打他，用铜链把他锁着带到巴比伦。
